summary: A solid audience tape with a good transfer that rivals soundboard clarity, though the performance itself isn’t discussed.
review: Both reviewers praise the quality of this audience recording, noting that the transfer is so clean it’s “only slightly better” than a soundboard source. No specific comments on the musical performance or setlist are provided, leaving the show quality largely unaddressed.

ai_rating.rationale: Recording is rated good based on solid audience transfer; lack of any performance commentary limits confidence in a higher rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Transfer is solid and clear, with sound quality comparable to a modest soundboard; typical audience ambience present but not detrimental.
